description_long: This stereo sound system features a boxy, rectangular main unit with a glossy black finish, sitting atop a circular base. The front face displays a series of control elements, including several round buttons and a horizontal slot, likely for media input or disc loading. The sides are relatively plain, with subtle paneling and a few protruding details, suggesting structural reinforcement or internal compartments. The rear is solid and unadorned, indicating that most interactive features are concentrated on the front. The overall design is compact and modern, with a reflective surface that gives it a sleek, high-tech appearance. The object appears robust and is likely constructed from hard plastic or composite materials, with internal components such as speakers and electronic circuitry.
description: A compact, glossy black stereo sound system with a boxy main unit and a circular base, featuring front-facing controls and a modern, reflective finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main control panel with several round buttons and a horizontal slot, all set on a glossy black surface.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, panelled surface with minor protrusions, lacking visible controls or ports.
description_view_2: The rear view is solid and featureless, emphasizing the object's boxy shape and glossy finish.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with subtle paneling and no visible interactive elements.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A row of round buttons and a horizontal slot are located on the front face, arranged in a linear fashion with no visible labels.
